description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a large build, wearing a loose-fitting t-shirt with a prominent number '5.' printed on the front. The t-shirt is paired with dark, slightly wrinkled pants and sturdy athletic shoes. His arms hang naturally at his sides, and his posture is relaxed but upright. The individual has a receding hairline with thinning hair on top and fuller hair at the back and sides. The facial expression is neutral, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing and overall appearance suggest a casual, everyday urban context.
description: A large adult male pedestrian in a casual t-shirt with a bold number, dark pants, and athletic shoes, standing upright with a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the t-shirt with a large '5.' graphic, relaxed arms, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the person's profile, rounded belly, and the fit of the t-shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the t-shirt, pants, and the shape of the head and shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the way the clothing fits from the opposite side.
attribute_hairstyle: balding with short hair on the sides and back
